title: Realistic Clocks 3D
description: A Resource Pack that makes clocks work like real life clocks.
body:
# Realistic Clocks

This is the 3D version of [Realistic Clocks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/realistic-clocks)
This pack changes clocks into a more readable realistic format.
Instead of showing the position of the sun and moon this pack gives the clock an hour and a minute hands.

The pack is very lightweight. Using it with other packs should not cause any issues.

Using this pack the clock takes on a 3D appearance when held and in item frames but a 2D appearance in the inventory, similar to spyglasses and tridents.

![A 3D clock in an item frame in front of a window](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e46c80eaf36202abd6ec94cc5cd5b950b5f3a6c0.png)
